# Project instructions

This is a Java Gradle university lab project about AI-assisted software engineering.

The goal is to evaluate whether specialised Copilot agents produce a better software artefact than a single generic Copilot agent.

Important rules:

- Start only from the existing `ConnectFour` interface.
- Do not use `src/main/resources/product.md`.
- Do not create a separate requirements document.
- Preserve the package `it.unibo`.
- Preserve the public `ConnectFour` interface.
- Prefer simple, readable Java.
- Prefer behavioural JUnit tests.
- Avoid unnecessary libraries.
- Clearly document assumptions caused by the minimal interface.
- When modifying production code, also consider tests and maintainability.
